subcodes.first_line: O ye the two doves nestling in the garden of the Love of God! Your detailed letter was received. Your services at this spot are recognized…
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو حمامه حدیقه محبه الله نامه مفصل شما رسید خدمات شما در این بساط مذکور و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
